overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character through a neon-lit cyberpunk washroom facility. The environment features blue hexagonal lighting, white porcelain sinks, and graffiti-covered concrete walls. The character moves steadily through connected chambers toward a distant pink-lit exit.

concrete wall with black graffiti markings and tags

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a narrow neon-lit washroom with white sinks lining the right wall. Blue hexagonal light fixtures glow on the far wall, and graffiti covers the concrete surfaces. The character walks forward through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor between washroom chambers

hexagonal blue neon light fixture mounted on the side wall
small cabinet with glowing blue trim lines

segments.scene_description: The character transitions into a tight service corridor with rough concrete walls. A hexagonal neon light fixture illuminates the right wall as the character squeezes through the narrow passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: larger washroom chamber with hexagonal wall tiles and pink neon exit

events.description: exits narrow corridor into larger washroom with distinctive hexagonal wall decorations
pink and magenta neon lights become visible at the far doorway ahead

agents.ego_description: character walking through secondary washroom area toward the pink-lit exit doorway

modern floor lamp with white cylindrical shade
black garbage bag on the floor near the wall
doorway frame illuminated with bright pink and magenta neon lights

segments.scene_description: The character enters a larger washroom chamber featuring distinctive hexagonal wall decorations and additional sinks. A floor lamp provides secondary lighting. As the character approaches the far end, a doorway illuminated with vibrant pink neon lights becomes visible, suggesting an exit to a club or bar area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile, neon-lit washroom facility that gradually opens into a vibrant, pink-lit exit. It begins in a narrow washroom where the character walks past white sinks and graffiti-covered concrete walls under the glow of blue hexagonal fixtures. As the character moves forward, the space tightens into a rough service corridor, squeezing past a single hexagonal light on the right wall. The scene then expands into a larger washroom chamber featuring additional sinks and hexagonal decorations illuminated by a floor lamp. Finally, the camera pushes toward the far end of the room, where the blue tones give way to a doorway glowing with vibrant pink neon lights.
